hero.title: The Control Layer of Autonomous Robotics
hero.subtitle: Titano orchestrates robots, venues, media and data through a unified operating system built for scale.

home.introText: Titano provides the missing operating layer that allows autonomous systems to operate reliably in real-world environments.
home.scaleText: From operational hubs in Europe to remote global support. Our network is designed to manage thousands of robots simultaneously.
home.mediaText: One of the first large-scale applications of Titano OS, enabling dynamic, data-driven advertising in physical spaces.
home.ctaTitle: Start your journey with Titano AI
home.ctaText: Deploy autonomous units in your venue or advertise on our network.

realWorldData.title: Real World Data
realWorldData.subtitle: Operational metrics collected during real deployments managed via Titano OS.
realWorldData.case1Title: CASE 1 — The Village, Parco de’ Medici (Roma)
realWorldData.case1Stats:
69 operational days
594,000 estimated physical impressions
4,500 QR scans
338 km autonomous travel
realWorldData.case2Footer: Brand activation via LUXA Autonomous Unit.
realWorldData.case3Footer: Engagement campaign in urban and university environments.
realWorldData.disclaimer: The data shown refers to single real deployment cases and does not represent aggregated network metrics.

ecosystem.heroSubtitle: A control infrastructure that unifies robots, data, and real-world operations.
ecosystem.roboticsDesc: Physical execution of autonomy on multi-brand robots in real-world environments.
ecosystem.titanoOSDesc: Control operating system for navigation, sensing, media, and fleet intelligence.
ecosystem.dataFabricDesc: Data layer that transforms physical activity into operational insights and decisions.
ecosystem.operationsHubDesc: Operational center for active monitoring and remote fleet management.
ecosystem.osLayersSubtitle: A control operating system designed to govern physical autonomy at scale.
ecosystem.layer1Desc: Localization, 3D mapping, and autonomous routing in real-world environments.
ecosystem.layer2Desc: Environmental perception, obstacle detection, and physical context understanding.
ecosystem.layer3Desc: Distribution of contextual and programmed content in physical space.
ecosystem.layer4Desc: Coordination, optimization, and continuous fleet learning.
ecosystem.layer5Desc: Unified data pipeline for analytics and reporting.
ecosystem.autonomyUpgradeDesc: We transform standard robotic platforms into intelligent autonomous agents capable of operating in dynamic environments without external infrastructure.
ecosystem.navigationDesc: Advanced path planning algorithms enable fluid and safe movement among people, optimizing routes in real-time.
ecosystem.interactionSafetyDesc: Certified safety systems and natural interfaces make Titano robots reliable and engaging collaborators for the public.
ecosystem.operationsHubText: A global control center to monitor, manage, and optimize every single robot in the fleet.
ecosystem.ctaText: Discover how we transform autonomous movement into a new measurable and engaging media channel.

workflow.title: The Titano Workflow
workflow.subtitle: From connection to continuous optimization.
workflow.connectDesc: Multi-brand robots connect to Titano OS
workflow.controlDesc: Venues operate and monitor fleets remotely
workflow.deployDesc: Applications (media, services, data) run on top

autonomousUnits.title: Autonomous Units
autonomousUnits.description: Titano operates in the real world through Autonomous Units: operational instances of Titano OS designed to perform specific physical functions. Each unit is hardware-agnostic, centrally controlled by the system, and can operate on different robotic platforms, maintaining consistency, safety, and scalability.
autonomousUnits.disclaimer: Powered by Titano OS. Hardware-agnostic autonomous units operating on third-party robotic platforms.

useCases.subtitle: Where Titano OS adds value.
useCases.universitiesDesc: Campus navigation, security, and student services.
useCases.retailDesc: Inventory scanning, customer assistance, and cleaning.
useCases.eventsDesc: Crowd management, info points, and brand activation.
useCases.transportationDesc: Passenger guidance, luggage assistance, and security patrol.
useCases.securityDesc: 24/7 autonomous surveillance, anomaly detection, and reporting.
useCases.ctaText: Bring your brand in motion. Contact us to discover Titano network opportunities.

footer.description: The European infrastructure for autonomous robotics and media in motion. Connecting AI and the real world.
